productDisplayName: Lotto Men XL Water Man Brown Slippers
description: Durable and flexible slippers from lotto for those used to roughing it. This slipper is designed to cushion the foot by hugging its every contour. Pair it with denims or bermudas. Upper Rubber thong straps with rubber toe separator Straps reinforced to the outsole for maximum durability Padded rubber dot-textured footbed for instep comfort Outsole Rubber outsole with multidirectional circular lugs for grip and traction Raised heel for walking ease Sandal care Rub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
